def: A recurring charge for the upkeep of equipment, property, software, or accounts. Common with bank accounts, HOA dues, and equipment leases.
avoid: Choose no-maintenance-fee bank accounts; negotiate maintenance fees in service contracts.

def: An additional charge by car dealerships above MSRP due to high demand, limited supply, or vehicle popularity. Pure dealer profit.
avoid: Refuse to pay any market adjustment markup; expand your search radius to dealers in less competitive markets.

def: The percentage added to the cost of materials by contractors, builders, or service providers. Often 10%–50%.
avoid: Request that materials be billed at cost with a disclosed markup; supply your own materials where feasible.

def: A recurring monthly charge for maintaining an account, service, or membership.
avoid: Choose no-monthly-fee accounts; review all subscriptions biennially and cancel unused services.

def: A charge when a transaction is declined due to insufficient funds in your account.
avoid: Sign up for overdraft protection or link a savings account; monitor account balances closely.
